## Power Distribution Unit Market Size & Overview

The Power Distribution Unit (PDU) Market was valued at USD 4.8 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach around USD 8.5 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 9.6% during the forecast period. The surge in global data traffic, the expansion of cloud infrastructure & the rapid deployment of edge computing facilities are driving demand for intelligent PDUs that offer real-time monitoring, remote management & environmental sensing capabilities.

## Power Distribution Unit Market Dynamics:

## Market Drivers

One of the primary drivers of the PDU market is the rapid global expansion of data centers, fueled by the exponential growth of cloud computing, AI workloads & digital services. The number of hyperscale data centers worldwide surpassed 850 facilities in 2023, with major growth concentrated in the U.S., China & Western Europe. As organizations aim to reduce operational costs & carbon footprints, PDUs with features like real-time energy monitoring, load balancing & remote power cycling are becoming essential components in modern IT & industrial environments. PDUs with IoT integration & remote management capabilities are essential in these applications to maintain uptime & optimize energy usage.

## Power Distribution Unit (PDU) Market Synopsis

Power Distribution Unit (PDU) Market Size Was Valued at USD 4.21 Billion in 2023, and is Projected to Reach USD 7.81 Billion by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 7.10% From 2024-2032.

A power distribution unit (PDU) is an apparatus that includes several power sockets, offering electrical protection and supplying power to IT equipment in a rack. There are two types of PDUs: basic (referred to as "dumb") and intelligent. Additionally, there are numerous intelligent rack PDUs available. Simple PDUs. These power strips convey the appropriate voltage and current to several outlets that supply power to IT equipment in racks. Supervised power distribution units.

In the year 2023, the market attained a volume of 11,297.4 thousand units, experiencing a growth of 18.5% (2019-2022).Switched PDUs offer remote management and control capabilities, allowing users to remotely monitor and control power distribution to individual outlets or groups. Therefore, the switched segment captured $1,255.1 million revenue in the market in 2023. Also, China utilized 138.39 thousand units of Switched PDUs in 2023. This capability is particularly valuable in data center environments where IT equipment needs to be powered on, off, or rebooted without physical access to the equipment.Energy efficiency is a key priority for organizations seeking to minimize operational costs and environmental impact. Organizations can optimize power usage, reduce waste, and lower energy bills by deploying energy efficient PDUs with power metering, load balancing, and intelligent power management features. Therefore, a growing focus on energy efficiency and sustainability drives the market's growth.Additionally"
   }
  ]
 }
]
